source.name: form.class
source.title: Form and Form Elements
source.description: This file contains the form and form elements definitions
source.organisation: MIOLO - Miolo Development Team - UNIVATES Centro Universitario
source.legal: CopyLeft (L) 2001-2002 UNIVATES, Lajeado/RS - Brasil Licensed under GPL (see COPYING.TXT or FSF at www.fsf.org for further details)

class.name: Form
class.description: The form class is the base class to construct a HTML form. Along with this class, different form object classes are defined, such as input fields (TextField), choices (Selection), check and radio boxes.

function.name: Form
function.param: the URL for the forms ACTION attribute.
function.description: This is the constructor of the Form class. It takes a title and an action url as optional parameters. The action URL is typically obtained by calling the MIOLO->GetActionURL() method.

function.name: GetName
function.description: Obtains the name of this form.

function.name: IsSubmitted
function.description: Detects if a form has been submitted.
function.returns: true if the form has been submitted otherwise false

function.name: GetTitle
function.description: Obtains the content of this form's title. Observe, that this can be anything other as a simple text string too, such as array of strings and an object implementing the Generate() method.
function.returns: a reference to the title of the form

function.name: SetTitle
function.description: Sets the form's title content

function.name: GetFooter
function.description: Obtains the content title of this form's footer. Observe, that this can be anything other as a simple text string too, such as array of strings and an object implementing the Generate() method.
function.returns: a reference to the footer of the form

function.name: SetFooter
function.description: Sets the form's footer content

function.name: GetFormValue
function.description: Obtains a submitted form field's value. This is a static function which takes in account that the Form class adds a prefix 'frm_' to all form variables. So when calling this function, the caller has to omit the prefix, using the same name, which was used in the field definition

function.name: SetFormValue
function.description: Sets the content of a form field to the specified value. The function does this by setting both, the field's value member and the global $_REQUEST to remain consistency between the values. It is expected, that the caller passes the same name as of the field definition (e.g. w/o 'frm_' prefix).

function.name: EscapeValue
function.description:
Used to escapes special characters contained in a form field's value Currently, only simple and double quote characters are subsituted with their corresponding HTML entities.
This function is used internally by some of the form's methods.

function.name: OnSubmit
function.description:
Adds JavaScript code which is to be executed, when the form is submitted. when the form is generated, and any JS code has been registered using this function, an OnSubmit handler is dynamically generated where the code is placed.

The generated code looks like the following where stmt stands for the registered statments

function.name: SetAction
function.description: Sets the action URL for this form. This is the URL to which the form data will be submitted. Usually, the URL is obtained by the GetActionURL of the MIOLO class.

function.name: SetHelp
function.description: Sets an URL to a help document. This document will be opened via JavaScript in a new window. If this URL is set, the form will display a help button in it's title bar.

function.name: GetFields
function.description: Obtain the list of form fields.
function.deprecated: this function will be changed in the near future, so don't use it anymore and keep in touch with the development team to figure out, what will be the replacement.

function.name: SetFields
function.description: This function is used to set an array of fields for the form.

function.name: _RegisterField
function.param: to a single field or an array of fields If an array of fields is passed, the function is called recursively for each of the contained fields.
function.description:
This function is used internally of the form framework to prepare the form fields for the usage within the form framework.

The function basically renames all fields to 'frm_' + name and assigns the value from the global array $_REQUEST if the field has no value (null) assigned.

function.name: AddField
function.param: a reference to a form field object
an optional hint for the form field
function.description: Adds a single field to the list of form fields and optionally adds a hint text for the field.

function.name: AddButton
function.param: the text which will appear on the button
the action; 'SUBMIT', 'RESET' for the buttons type attribute or a JavaScript instruction for the button's onClick attribute
function.description: Adds a form button. The button is added to the list of form buttons. By default, the form framework arranges the buttons at the bottom of the form container from the left to the right.

function.name: SetButtonLabel
function.param: the 0 based index of the button
function.description: This function is mainly used, to change the labels of the form's default buttons for submit and return.

function.name: ShowReturn
function.param: the visible state of the return button
function.description: This function can be used to show or hide the form's return button.

function.name: ShowReset
function.param: the visible state of the reset button
function.description: This function can be used to show or hide the form's reset button.

function.name: GetShowHints
function.description: This function returns the visibility of the form's hint texts.

function.name: ShowHints
function.param: the visible state of the hint texts
function.description: This function can be used to show or hide the form's hint texts. Each form element may have a hint text associated with it. Using this method, one can enable/disable the display of the texts. This may be useful for implementing kind of an beginner/expert mode.

function.name: GetFieldList
function.description:
This is a placeholder function to bu the form's field list. It is excpected, that the form returns a scalar list of all defined fields which carry a form field value. Thus, form elements of decorative purpose only should be omitted.

Derived classes such as TabbedForm override this function to provide the list of fields independently of the form's layout.

function.name: _GetFieldList
function.description: Internal function which takes a list of form elements possibly consisting of single fields as well as arrays and returns a scalar the list of fields filtering out some known decorative form fields.
function.returns: a scalar array of form fields

function.name: ValidateAll
function.param:
flag how to handle invalid fields;
if true, an error message will be shown
if false no error message will be shown and the caller can provide an appropriate action based on the return value.
function.description: Validates all form fields to have a non-empty content
function.returns: true if all fields have a value; false if any of the fields has been left empty

function.name: Validate
function.param: Fields names wich should be validated
function.description: Validates data for the form fields. The validation is based on the parameter $required
function.returns: true if the fields have a value; false if any of the fields has been left empty

function.name: Error
function.description: registrar um erro relacionado ao form

function.name: AddError
function.description: registrar um erro relacionado ao form

function.name: HasErrors
function.description: returns the number of error messages or 0, if no errors exist

function.name: CollectInput
function.description: Get form data and put it into the class members

function.name: GetData
function.description: obtains form fields in a FormData object

function.name: SetData
function.description:
Set form fields values. A subclassed form will likely override this method, in order to provide a specialized processing for the passed data object.

This method simply calls the _SetData() method of the Form class.

function.name: _SetData
function.description:
This method sets the form field values in way, that it iterates thru the list of fields and sets the values of all fields matching the data object attribute names.

In short it does the following
$frm_name = $data->name;
This implies that the form field names must be identical the data member names.

function.name: GetFieldValue
function.description: obtains a form field's value

function.name: SetFieldValue
function.description: Set a form field's value

function.name: GetField
function.description: Get a form field's value

function.name: GetBody
function.description: generates the form's body and returns the resulting HTML code

function.name: Generate
function.description: Generate entire input form

function.name: GenerateBody
function.description: Generate form body

function.name: GenerateScript
function.description: Generate form specific script code

function.name: LayoutFormFields
function.description: Do Layout of (visible) fields within form area

class.name: FormData
class.description: pseudo class to collect form field values

var.name: form
var.declaration: var $form; // back reference to form object

var.name: type
var.declaration: var $type = 'required'; // ex. required | optional | ignore/ readonly

class.name: Option
class.description: A general purpos class for Options for usage with CheckboxGroup, RadioButtonGroup and Selection

class.name: RadioButtonGroup
class.description: Implements a group of radio buttons

class.name: MultiTextField
class.description: Implements input field, which can have multiple input values relies on _MIOLO_MultiTextField_*() JavaScript support

class.name: MultiTextField2
class.description: Implements input field, which can have multiple input values relies on _MIOLO_MultiTextField_*() JavaScript support

class.name: MultiChoiceField
class.title: MultiChoice.class
class.legal: CopyLeft (L) 2004 SOLIS Licensed under GPL (for further details read the LICENSE file)
